name: Once Campfire
tagline: Super simple group chat, without a subscription.
description:
Super simple group chat, without a subscription.

Docs: https://github.com/basecamp/once-campfire?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  campfire:
    image: ghcr.io/basecamp/once-campfire:${TAG:-main}
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - campfire-storage:/rails/storage
    environment:
      - SECRET_KEY_BASE=NmZmYzg3ODJjMmMxNWYwMGVlZWFlZmQ5
      - VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY=${VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY:-b17f39189c03c31852eede33c8acc940}
      - VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY=${VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY:-fa92f7e80561557d36edd16653af2a69}
      - DISABLE_SSL=${DISABLE_SSL:-true}
      - SSL_DOMAIN=${SSL_DOMAIN:-false}
      - SKIP_TELEMETRY=${SKIP_TELEMETRY:-true}
      - SENTRY_DSN=${SENTRY_DSN}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://localhost/up
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    ports:
      - 42086:80
volumes:
  campfire-storage: null
